name: Jonathan's Broccoli Soup
recipeIngredient: salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
The recipe called for 2 heads of broccoli, chopped. I estimated this as approximately 6 cups.
The recipe called for Stilton Cheese.
1. In a large saucepan, sauté the oil over medium heat. Add broccoli, onion, sage, and garlic. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
2. Stir in diced potato, chicken broth, bay leaf, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about 20 minutes or until the potato is fully cooked.
3. Purée the soup in a food processor and return it to the heat. Adjust seasoning with cream and gently simmer. Do not let it boil.
4. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). Spoon hot soup into individual serving bowls, sprinkle with Stilton Cheese, and cover with puff pastry that has been rolled out. Make sure the pastry does not touch the soup.
5. Brush the top of the pastry with an egg wash (mixing egg and water). Bake for 10 minutes, watching closely to prevent burning.
